title: We Blow Kisses
excerpt: I was thrilled to receive my very own We Blow Kisses shirt in the mail the other day! It is so exciting to see Kristina's new adventure unfold. I've always been a fan of her handwriting on her amazing paper…
body: I was thrilled to receive my very own We Blow Kisses shirt in the mail the other day! It is so exciting to see Kristina's new adventure unfold. I've always been a fan of her handwriting on her amazing paper projects, so to have it on a shirt, my hearts goes boom! The shirt itself is made of the softest cotton, super comfy. Love all the details she put into her packaging too. So happy for you, Kristina and team! CONGRATULATIONS! XO!
